props.title: Organizations (Factions)
props.description: Guilds, orders, cults, hidden networks, and allied powers that shape Myrdae.

props.title: Reference Links
Advents of Harmony
props.description: Myrdae's oldest organization, known for exploration, preserved history, deep archives, and trusted advisors.

props.title: Cloak of Defiance
props.description: A mercenary network and sprawling thieves' guild that rose from the shadows of the Malfease.

props.title: Everdawn
props.description: A widespread nature-minded faction that watches the boundary between civilization and the natural world.

props.title: Meridian
props.description: A recognized force for law, order, protection, and alliances across the people of Myrdae.

props.title: Tegenwald Phet
props.description: Seekers of knowledge and power through magic, secrecy, and hidden study.

props.title: Andërs
props.description: An artistic public face conceals a diplomatic network of politically placed operatives.

props.title: Astereal Accord
props.description: Protectors focused on threats from beyond Myrdae, unstable breaches, and corrupted magic.

props.title: Barrenscars
props.description: Mercenaries known for trafficking people.

props.title: Bastille
props.description: Listed among the well-known organizations of Myrdae.

props.title: Bloodhand
props.description: Blades for hire among Myrdae's known powers.

props.title: Empyrean Ascendants
props.description: Also known as the League of the Sky, they reject the gods and pursue higher existence.

props.title: Eradic of Ghone
props.description: A cult devoted to Si'julous Ghone and the promise of a coming unbinding.

props.title: Etterset
props.description: An Emberstran-founded thieves' guild focused on theft, smuggling, and underground trade.

props.title: Howling Meek
props.description: Hunters who pursue others for sport or profit.

props.title: Malfease
props.description: A largely disbanded worldwide thieves' guild.

props.title: Osmanae
props.description: A diminished ancient order whose relics and artifacts still remain mostly undiscovered.

props.title: Paragon Tear
props.description: A Natafae-linked group centered on growth through pain and discipline.

props.title: Populi Verde
props.description: Enthusiasts obsessed with Mother Nature.

props.title: Promissory
props.description: A business-facing alias used around the acquisition and trade of hard-to-find goods.

props.title: Radiant Eye
props.description: Listed among the well-known organizations of Myrdae.

props.title: Rel'Udomina
props.description: A secretive organization that undermines entrenched rulers and destabilizes political structures.

props.title: Umbral Order
props.description: A hidden order that grew from exile into a covert thieves' guild.

props.title: Venomtips
props.description: Killers for hire.
